title: Diplodoc configuration file schema (.yfm)
description: Configuration file for Diplodoc documentation builder (.yfm or .yfm.yaml)
markdownDescription: Configuration file for Diplodoc documentation builder (`.yfm` or `.yfm.yaml`)

input.description: string. Path to input directory with documentation sources.
input.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to input directory with documentation sources.

output.description: string. Path to output directory for build artifacts.
output.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to output directory for build artifacts.

strict.description: boolean. Exit with non-zero code on errors or warnings.
strict.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Exit with non-zero code on errors or warnings.

jobs.description: integer (>=0). Number of parallel worker threads. 0 means single-threaded, omitted value uses cpus-1.
jobs.markdownDescription:
**`integer (>=0)`** Number of parallel worker threads.

- `0` — single-threaded
- omitted — uses `cpus - 1`

workerMaxOldSpace.description: integer (>=0). Max old space size for worker threads in megabytes.
workerMaxOldSpace.markdownDescription: **`integer (>=0)`** Max old space size for worker threads in megabytes.

config.description: string. Path to an alternative config file.
config.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to an alternative config file.

copyOnWrite.description: boolean. Use COPYFILE_FICLONE flag for file copying.

originAsInput.description: boolean. Allow modifying the input directory in-place.
originAsInput.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow modifying the input directory in-place.

langs.description: LangItem[]. Languages supported by the documentation project. Each item is a language code string or an extended object.
langs.markdownDescription:
**`LangItem[]`** Languages supported by the documentation project.

Each item is a language code string or an extended `LangItem` object.

outputFormat.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Output format.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `html` | Render to static HTML |
| `md` | Render to enriched Markdown with metadata |

varsPreset.description: string. Name of the variables preset from presets.yaml. Merged with the 'default' section.
varsPreset.markdownDescription: **`string`** Name of the variables preset from `presets.yaml`. Merged with the `default` section.

vars.description: object. Template variables passed directly to the build. Overrides matching keys from presets.yaml.
vars.markdownDescription: **`object`** Template variables passed directly to the build. Overrides matching keys from `presets.yaml`.

allowHTML.description: boolean. Allow raw HTML inside Markdown files. Deprecated: Use allowHtml instead.
allowHTML.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Allow raw HTML inside Markdown files.

> ⚠️ **Deprecated:** Use `allowHtml` instead.

allowHtml.description: boolean. Allow raw HTML inside Markdown files.
allowHtml.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow raw HTML inside Markdown files.

sanitizeHtml.description: boolean. Sanitize transformed HTML output. Slow but more secure.
sanitizeHtml.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Sanitize transformed HTML output. Slow but more secure.

sanitizeOptions.description: object. Sanitizer configuration options (passed to the HTML sanitizer).
sanitizeOptions.markdownDescription: **`object`** Sanitizer configuration options (passed to the HTML sanitizer).

oneOf.description: string. Single TLD for the linkify plugin.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Single TLD for the linkify plugin.

oneOf.description: string[]. Array of TLDs for the linkify plugin.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Array of TLDs for the linkify plugin.

linkifyTlds.description: string | string[]. TLD configuration for the linkify plugin.
linkifyTlds.markdownDescription: **`string | string[]`** TLD configuration for the linkify plugin.

ignore.description: string[]. Glob patterns for paths to exclude from processing.
ignore.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Glob patterns for paths to exclude from processing.

ignoreStage.description: string[]. TOC stages to exclude from the build. Values: 'new', 'preview', 'tech-preview', 'skip'.
ignoreStage.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** TOC stages to exclude from the build.

Allowed values: `new`, `preview`, `tech-preview`, `skip`.

staticContent.description: boolean. Allow loading custom resources into statically generated pages.
staticContent.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow loading custom resources into statically generated pages.

addSystemMeta.description: boolean. Include system variables from presets in file metadata.
addSystemMeta.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Include system variables from presets in file metadata.

addMapFile.description: boolean. Write all documentation paths to file.json. Deprecated: Use buildManifest instead.
addMapFile.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Write all documentation paths to `file.json`.

> ⚠️ **Deprecated:** Use `buildManifest` instead.

addAlternateMeta.description: boolean. Add alternate and canonical meta tags to pages.
addAlternateMeta.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Add `alternate` and `canonical` meta tags to pages.

supportGithubAnchors.description: boolean. Use GitHub-compatible heading anchor format.

breaks.description: boolean. Treat single newlines in Markdown as hard line breaks.
breaks.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Treat single newlines in Markdown as hard line breaks.

linkify.description: boolean. Automatically convert URL-like text to links.
linkify.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Automatically convert URL-like text to links.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable VCS integration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable VCS integration.

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable VCS integration.

endpoint.description: string. VCS provider API endpoint (from github-vcs / arcadia-vcs).

initialCommit.description: string. Initial commit SHA for redirect tracking (from github-vcs / arcadia-vcs).
initialCommit.markdownDescription: **`string`** Initial commit SHA for redirect tracking (from `github-vcs` / `arcadia-vcs`).

oneOf.description: object. VCS connector configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** VCS connector configuration. Accepts extension-specific fields.

vcs.description: boolean | object. Enable or disable the VCS connector.
vcs.markdownDescription: **`boolean | object`** Enable or disable the VCS connector. Object form accepts extension-specific fields.

vcsToken.description: string. VCS access token. WARNING: Do not store secrets in the config file.
vcsToken.markdownDescription:
**`string`** VCS access token.

> ⚠️ **WARNING:** Do not store secrets in the config file. Use environment variables or CLI arguments instead.

vcsPath.description: boolean | Toggleable. Show the VCS file path in the page header.
vcsPath.markdownDescription: **`boolean | Toggleable`** Show the VCS file path in the page header.

mtimes.description: boolean | Toggleable. Collect file modification timestamps from VCS.
mtimes.markdownDescription: **`boolean | Toggleable`** Collect file modification timestamps from VCS.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable author collection.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable author collection.

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable author collection.

ignore.description: string[]. List of author login patterns to ignore.
ignore.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** List of author login patterns to ignore.

oneOf.description: object. Author collection configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** Author collection configuration.

authors.description: boolean | object. Collect per-file authors from VCS.
authors.markdownDescription: **`boolean | object`** Collect per-file authors from VCS.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable contributor collection.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable contributor collection.

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable contributor collection.

ignore.description: string[]. List of contributor login patterns to ignore.
ignore.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** List of contributor login patterns to ignore.

oneOf.description: object. Contributor collection configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** Contributor collection configuration.

contributors.description: boolean | object. Collect per-file contributors from VCS.
contributors.markdownDescription: **`boolean | object`** Collect per-file contributors from VCS.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable the Liquid template engine.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable the Liquid template engine.

oneOf.description: TemplateConfig. Liquid template engine configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`TemplateConfig`** Liquid template engine configuration.

template.description: boolean | TemplateConfig. Configure the Liquid template engine.
template.markdownDescription: **`boolean | TemplateConfig`** Configure the Liquid template engine.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable YFM linting.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable YFM linting.

oneOf.description: LintConfig. YFM lint configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`LintConfig`** YFM lint configuration.

lint.description: boolean | LintConfig. Configure YFM linting during build.
lint.markdownDescription: **`boolean | LintConfig`** Configure YFM linting during build.

extensions.description: ExtensionItem[]. External extensions loaded on startup.
extensions.markdownDescription: **`ExtensionItem[]`** External extensions loaded on startup. Each item is a package name string or an object with `name` and options.

toc.description: boolean. Show the table of contents sidebar.
toc.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show the table of contents sidebar.

toc-header.description: boolean. Show the TOC header section.

favicon-src.description: string. URL to a custom favicon.

feedbackUrl.description: string (uri). URL endpoint for feedback submission.

resources.description: Resources. Custom scripts, styles, and CSP directives.
resources.markdownDescription: **`Resources`** Custom scripts, styles, and CSP directives.

allowCustomResources.description: boolean. Allow loading custom resources in static output mode.
allowCustomResources.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow loading custom resources in static output mode.

disableCsp.description: boolean. Do not inject Content-Security-Policy meta tags into generated HTML pages.
disableCsp.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Do not inject `Content-Security-Policy` meta tags into generated HTML pages.

Use when CSP is managed externally (e.g. via server HTTP headers).

oneOf.description: string. Override the base brand color.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Override the base brand color.

oneOf.description: null. Disable theme.yaml processing.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`null`** Disable `theme.yaml` processing.

theme.description: string | null. Override the base brand color or disable theming.
theme.markdownDescription:
**`string | null`** Override the base brand color or disable theming.

`null` disables `theme.yaml` processing.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable search.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable search.

oneOf.description: SearchConfig. Search feature configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`SearchConfig`** Search feature configuration.

search.description: boolean | SearchConfig. Configure the documentation search feature.
search.markdownDescription: **`boolean | SearchConfig`** Configure the documentation search feature.

singlePage.description: boolean. Produce a single-page HTML variant for each TOC.
singlePage.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Produce a single-page HTML variant for each TOC.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable PDF output generation.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable PDF output generation.

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable PDF output generation.
enabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable PDF output generation.

hiddenPolicy.description: boolean. Exclude hidden TOC items from PDF output.
hiddenPolicy.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Exclude hidden TOC items from PDF output.

oneOf.description: object. PDF output configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** PDF output configuration.

pdf.description: boolean | object. Configure PDF output generation.

pdfDebug.description: boolean. Include PDF start pages in the output for debugging.
pdfDebug.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Include PDF start pages in the output for debugging.

mergeIncludes.description: boolean. Merge include contents into parent files.
mergeIncludes.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Merge include contents into parent files.

mergeSvg.description: boolean. Inline SVG files instead of linking them.
mergeSvg.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Inline SVG files instead of linking them.

disableMetaMaxLineWidth.description: boolean. Disable maximum line width restriction in metadata blocks.
disableMetaMaxLineWidth.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable maximum line width restriction in metadata blocks.

preprocess.description: object. Fine-tune Markdown preprocessing for md output format.
preprocess.markdownDescription: **`object`** Fine-tune Markdown preprocessing for `md` output format.

mergeIncludes.description: boolean. Merge include contents into parent files (shorthand for preprocess.mergeIncludes).
mergeIncludes.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Merge include contents into parent files.

Shorthand for `preprocess.mergeIncludes`.

maxInlineSvgSize.description: FileSize. Maximum size for inline SVG embedding.
maxInlineSvgSize.markdownDescription:
**`FileSize`** Maximum size for inline SVG embedding.

Examples: `100K`, `1M`, `102400`.

maxHtmlSize.description: FileSize. Maximum rendered HTML file size.
maxHtmlSize.markdownDescription:
**`FileSize`** Maximum rendered HTML file size.

Examples: `100K`, `1M`, `102400`.

maxAssetSize.description: FileSize. Maximum asset file size. 0 disables the check.
maxAssetSize.markdownDescription: **`FileSize`** Maximum asset file size. `0` disables the check.

multilineTermDefinitions.description: boolean. Allow term definitions to span multiple lines.
multilineTermDefinitions.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Allow term definitions to span multiple lines.

When enabled, a definition continues until the next `[*key]:` or end of block. Default: `false`.

content.description: object. Content size limits and processing options.
content.markdownDescription: **`object`** Content size limits and processing options.

removeHiddenTocItems.description: boolean. Strip hidden items from the table of contents.
removeHiddenTocItems.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Strip hidden items from the table of contents.

removeEmptyTocItems.description: boolean. Strip empty items from the table of contents.
removeEmptyTocItems.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Strip empty items from the table of contents.

buildManifest.description: boolean. Emit yfm-build-manifest.json with all documentation paths.

crawlerManifest.description: boolean. Emit crawler-manifest.json mapping each source file to its external links.
crawlerManifest.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Emit `crawler-manifest.json` mapping each source file to its external links.

Useful for link-health checks (detecting 404, 403, etc.).

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable changelog generation.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable changelog generation.

oneOf.description: string. Enable changelog generation with the specified format.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Enable changelog generation with the specified format.

changelogs.markdownDescription: **`boolean | string`** Enable changelog generation. String value selects the format.

watch.description: boolean. Enable file-watching mode with incremental rebuilds.
watch.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable file-watching mode with incremental rebuilds.

skipHtmlExtension.description: boolean. Remove .html extension from generated links.

rawAddMeta.description: boolean. Add raw metadata to pages.

addResourcesMeta.description: boolean. Add resources metadata to pages.

addMetadataMeta.description: boolean. Add metadata meta tags to pages.
addMetadataMeta.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Add metadata meta tags to pages.

id.description: string. Google Tag Manager container ID.

mode.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** GTM consent mode.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `base` | Base consent mode |
| `notification` | Notification consent mode |

analytics.description: object. Web analytics configuration (e.g. Google Tag Manager).
analytics.markdownDescription: **`object`** Web analytics configuration (e.g. Google Tag Manager).

docs-viewer.description: DocsViewerConfig. Configuration for the docs-viewer preview server.
docs-viewer.markdownDescription: **`DocsViewerConfig`** Configuration for the docs-viewer preview server.

domain.description: string. Domain to forward query parameters to.
domain.markdownDescription: **`string`** Domain to forward query parameters to.

parameters.description: array. List of query parameter names to forward.
parameters.markdownDescription: **`array`** List of query parameter names to forward.

iframes.description: object[]. Per-domain query parameter forwarding rules.

queryParameters.description: object. Query parameter forwarding rules for embedded iframes.
queryParameters.markdownDescription: **`object`** Query parameter forwarding rules for embedded iframes.

build.description: object. Scoped overrides for the build command. Accepts the same properties as the root level.
build.markdownDescription: **`object`** Scoped overrides for the `build` command. Accepts the same properties as the root level.

publish.description: PublishConfig. Configuration for the publish command.

translate.description: TranslateConfig. Configuration for the translate command.

disableLiquid.description: boolean. Disable the Liquid template engine. Deprecated: Use template.enabled instead.
disableLiquid.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Disable the Liquid template engine.

> ⚠️ **Deprecated:** Use `template.enabled` instead.

applyPresets.description: boolean. Apply variable presets. Deprecated: Use template.features.substitutions instead.

resolveConditions.description: boolean. Resolve Liquid conditions. Deprecated: Use template.features.conditions instead.

conditionsInCode.description: boolean. Process conditions inside code blocks. Deprecated: Use template.scopes.code instead.
conditionsInCode.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Process conditions inside code blocks.

> ⚠️ **Deprecated:** Use `template.scopes.code` instead.

lintDisabled.description: boolean. Disable linting. Deprecated: Use lint.enabled instead.

needToSanitizeHtml.description: boolean. Sanitize HTML output. Deprecated: Use sanitizeHtml instead.

LangItem.title: Language item
LangItem.description: string | object. A language code string or an extended language configuration object.
LangItem.markdownDescription: **`string | object`** A language code string or an extended language configuration object.

oneOf.description: string. ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. 'en', 'ru').
oneOf.markdownDescription:
**`string`** ISO 639-1 language code.

Examples: `en`, `ru`.

tld.description: string. Top-level domain associated with this language.
tld.markdownDescription: **`string`** Top-level domain associated with this language.

href.description: string. URL to the documentation in this language.
href.markdownDescription: **`string`** URL to the documentation in this language.

Toggleable.title: Toggleable feature
Toggleable.description: boolean | object. A boolean flag or an object with an 'enabled' property.
Toggleable.markdownDescription: **`boolean | object`** A boolean flag or an object with an `enabled` property.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable the feature.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable the feature.

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable the feature.

FileSize.title: File size
FileSize.description: string | integer. A file size as bytes (integer) or a string with optional K/M suffix.
FileSize.markdownDescription:
**`string | integer`** A file size value.

- `string` — with optional unit suffix: `K` (kilobytes), `M` (megabytes). Example: `100K`, `2M`.
- `integer` — size in bytes. `0` disables the check.

oneOf.description: string. Size with optional unit suffix: K (kilobytes), M (megabytes). Examples: '100K', '2M', '1024'.
oneOf.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Size with optional unit suffix.

- `K` / `k` — kilobytes
- `M` / `m` — megabytes

Examples: `100K`, `2M`, `1024`.

oneOf.description: integer. Size in bytes. 0 disables the check.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`integer`** Size in bytes. `0` disables the check.

ExtensionItem.title: Extension item
ExtensionItem.description: string | object. An extension package name or a configuration object.
ExtensionItem.markdownDescription: **`string | object`** An extension package name or a configuration object.

oneOf.description: string. NPM package name of the extension.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** NPM package name of the extension.

name.description: string. NPM package name of the extension.
name.markdownDescription: **`string`** NPM package name of the extension.

oneOf.description: object. Extension configuration with name and optional settings.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** Extension configuration with `name` and optional settings.

Resources.title: Custom resources
Resources.description: object. Custom scripts, styles, and CSP directives.
Resources.markdownDescription: **`object`** Custom scripts, styles, and CSP directives.

script.description: string[]. Paths or URLs to JavaScript files to inject into pages.
script.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Paths or URLs to JavaScript files to inject into pages.

style.description: string[]. Paths or URLs to CSS files to inject into pages.
style.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Paths or URLs to CSS files to inject into pages.

csp.description: object[]. Content Security Policy directive overrides.
csp.markdownDescription:
**`object[]`** Content Security Policy directive overrides.

Each item maps a CSP directive name to allowed sources.

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable the Liquid template engine.
enabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable the Liquid template engine.

keepNotVar.description: boolean. Keep unresolved variable placeholders instead of removing them.
keepNotVar.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Keep unresolved variable placeholders instead of removing them.

text.description: boolean. Process template expressions in regular text.
text.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Process template expressions in regular text.

code.description: boolean. Process template expressions inside code blocks.
code.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Process template expressions inside code blocks.

oneOf.description: boolean. Enable or disable conditional blocks.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable conditional blocks.

oneOf.description: string. 'strict' mode is used by the translate command.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** `strict` mode is used by the `translate` command.

conditions.description: boolean | 'strict'. Enable conditional blocks ({% if %}...{% endif %}).
conditions.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | 'strict'`** Enable conditional blocks (`{% if %}...{% endif %}`).

`strict` mode is used by the `translate` command.

cycles.description: boolean. Enable loop constructs ({% for %}...{% endfor %}).

cicles.description: boolean. Alternative spelling of 'cycles'. Enable loop constructs.
cicles.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Alternative spelling of `cycles`. Enable loop constructs (`{% for %}...{% endfor %}`).

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable YFM linting.

oneOf.description: string. Path to an external .yfmlint config file.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to an external `.yfmlint` config file.

oneOf.description: object. Inline lint rule configuration.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** Inline lint rule configuration.

config.description: string | object. Lint rules: path to .yfmlint file or inline configuration.
config.markdownDescription: **`string | object`** Lint rules: path to `.yfmlint` file or inline rule configuration object.

enabled.description: boolean. Enable or disable the search feature.
enabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable the search feature.

provider.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Search provider.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `local` | Built-in local search |
| `algolia` | Algolia search service |

appId.description: string. Algolia Application ID (required when provider=algolia).
appId.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Algolia Application ID.

Required when `provider: algolia`.

apiKey.description: string. Algolia API Key for indexing (provider=algolia). WARNING: Do not store secrets in config.
apiKey.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Algolia API Key for indexing (`provider: algolia`).

> ⚠️ **WARNING:** Do not store secrets in the config file.

searchApiKey.description: string. Client-side Algolia API key for search queries (provider=algolia).
searchApiKey.markdownDescription: **`string`** Client-side Algolia API key for search queries (`provider: algolia`).

index.description: boolean. Whether to create and upload the search index (provider=algolia).
index.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Whether to create and upload the search index (`provider: algolia`).

api.description: string. Path to the client-side search API script (provider=algolia).
api.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to the client-side search API script (`provider: algolia`).

tolerance.markdownDescription:
**`integer (0–2)`** Wildcard search tolerance level (`provider: local`).

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `0` | Exact match |
| `1` | Trailing wildcard |
| `2` | Leading and trailing wildcard |

confidence.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Search scoring strategy (`provider: local`).

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `phrased` | Phrase-based scoring |
| `sparsed` | Sparse matching scoring |

confidense.description: string (enum). Alternative spelling of 'confidence'. Search scoring strategy (provider=local).
confidense.markdownDescription:
**`string (enum)`** Alternative spelling of `confidence`. Search scoring strategy (`provider: local`).

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| `phrased` | Phrase-based scoring |
| `sparsed` | Sparse matching scoring |

indexSettings.description: object. Algolia index settings (provider=algolia). Passed to Algolia setSettings.
indexSettings.markdownDescription:
**`object`** Algolia index settings (`provider: algolia`). Passed to Algolia `setSettings`.

Supports `searchableAttributes`, `attributesToHighlight`, etc.

querySettings.description: object. Algolia query settings (provider=algolia). Merged into each search request.
querySettings.markdownDescription:
**`object`** Algolia query settings (`provider: algolia`). Merged into each search request.

Supports `hitsPerPage`, `attributesToRetrieve`, etc.

projectId.description: object. Map of language codes to project IDs. Use 'default' key for fallback.
projectId.markdownDescription: **`object`** Map of language codes to project IDs. Use `default` key for fallback.

hasOutsideClick.description: boolean. Close the widget when clicking outside of it.
hasOutsideClick.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Close the widget when clicking outside of it.

oneOf.description: string. DOM element ID to mount the widget into.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** DOM element ID to mount the widget into.

oneOf.description: null. Use default mount point.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`null`** Use default mount point.

parentId.description: string | null. DOM element ID to mount the widget into. null uses default.
parentId.markdownDescription: **`string | null`** DOM element ID to mount the widget into. `null` uses the default mount point.

disabled.description: boolean. Disable the AI expert widget.

customLabel.description: Record<string, string | boolean>. Map of language codes to custom widget header labels.
customLabel.markdownDescription:
**`Record<string, string | boolean>`** Map of language codes to custom widget header labels.

Use `default` key for fallback. Only for whitelisted projects.

prefix.description: string. Key prefix inside the bucket.

accessKeyId.description: string. S3 access key ID. WARNING: Do not store secrets in the config file.
accessKeyId.markdownDescription:
**`string`** S3 access key ID.

> ⚠️ **WARNING:** Do not store secrets in the config file. Use environment variables instead.

secretAccessKey.description: string. S3 secret access key. WARNING: Do not store secrets in the config file.
secretAccessKey.markdownDescription:
**`string`** S3 secret access key.

> ⚠️ **WARNING:** Do not store secrets in the config file. Use environment variables instead.

hidden.description: string[]. Glob patterns to exclude from upload.
hidden.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Glob patterns to exclude from upload.

disabled.description: boolean. Disable the bug report widget.

form.description: string. Custom bug report form URL or path.
form.markdownDescription: **`string`** Custom bug report form URL or path.

oneOf.description: string. Pythia feedback survey owner ID.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Pythia feedback survey owner ID.

oneOf.description: Record<string, string>. Map of language codes to owner IDs. Use 'default' key for fallback.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`Record<string, string>`** Map of language codes to owner IDs. Use `default` key for fallback.

ownerId.description: string | object. Pythia feedback survey owner ID.
ownerId.markdownDescription: **`string | Record<string, string>`** Pythia feedback survey owner ID. Object form maps language codes to IDs.

hideHeader.description: boolean. Hide the feedback widget header.

testIds.description: object. Test form IDs for A/B testing.
testIds.markdownDescription: **`object`** Test form IDs for A/B testing.

project-name.description: string. Project URL slug. Lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores. Max 63 chars.
project-name.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Project URL slug.

- Lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores
- Max 63 characters
- Reserved names: `build`, `docs-assets`, `api`

no-index.description: boolean. Disallow indexing by external search engines.
no-index.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disallow indexing by external search engines (adds `noindex` meta tag).

langs.description: string[]. Languages shown in the docs UI. First item is the default.
langs.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Languages shown in the docs UI. First item is the default.

favicon-src.description: string. Favicon URL for the browser tab.
favicon-src.markdownDescription: **`string`** Favicon URL for the browser tab.

logo-options.description: LogoOptions. Logo configuration for the docs viewer.
logo-options.markdownDescription: **`LogoOptions`** Logo configuration for the docs viewer.

oneOf.description: integer. Single Yandex Metrika counter ID.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`integer`** Single Yandex Metrika counter ID.

protected.description: boolean. Enable access protection for the project.
